div.p: Intel Manual Quality Specification — LRU Duplicate Detection Node

ul.li: Source: SHA-256 hash of OriginID + OriginClock.
Storage: Truncated to 64-bit uint64 for fast map lookups.
Collision: P < 10⁻¹¹ at max capacity (12k entries).
Purpose: TTL enforcement and drift analysis.
Logic: Primary LRU order is maintained by the list.List.
Optimization: Enables O(1) eviction and O(1) update.
